image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: A one-atom-thick carbon sheet with extraordinary strength and conductivity.
Context visual: Meet graphene, the wonder material that defies our understanding of strength and flexibility.
Escalation visual: Imagine a material 200 times stronger than steel, yet lighter than paper.
Evidence visual: Scientists are exploring its potential in electronics, energy storage, and even medical applications.
Payoff visual: But many of these applications are still in the early stages of research.
Cta visual: Curious about the future of materials? Follow for more insights!
